notes: This artifact is the accepted default board-side projector calibration for the BEV-first steering refactor.

The source points are derived from the fixed-camera straight-entry recalibration capture new/verification/bev-board-straight-entry-recalib-20260426T151213Z/steering-media/frames/frame-001671.raw using the stable road-surface runs at rows 220 and 68.
The measured row 220 run is 19..305 px and the measured row 68 run is 108..220 px under the runtime Otsu threshold used by AnalyzeFrame.
The target lateral width is intentionally constant at the current BEV geometry nominal lane width of 0.42m, so width validation remains a geometry contract rather than a projector side effect.
Runtime values in default_params.json must remain traceable to this artifact unless an explicit calibration change lands.
